Welcome to 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly – your go-to spot for the notable deals and latest releases in PC gaming at a glance every Saturday morning. items.title: Electrified Weekly – Launch deals on new Juiced Scrambler, Lectric XPress2, and Heybike Saturn e-bikes from $999, Anker SOLIX, more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. We’ve had another jam-packed week of Green Deals that will be joining the past week’s sales leading us up and through Memorial Day, but there are four standouts amongst the bunch that are all brand new launches! First, we are very excited to welcome back Juiced Bikes to the land of the living, as the brand is officially relaunching after its 2024 financial trouble with the new Scrambler Moto-Style e-bikes + $245 FREE bundles starting from $1,699. Right behind it is Lectric’s new XPress2 Long-Range Commuter and Cruiser e-bikes with $336 FREE bundles at $1,399, as well as the early-bird deal on Heybike’s Saturn Moped-Style e-bikes starting from $999. Lastly, we also have a pre-sale means to score Anker’s upcoming SOLIX S2000 Portable Power Station for $599 (over its $689 launch price on June 2), and tons of other amazing deals waiting for you below.
